title: dalbergia havilandii
intro: Dalbergia havilandii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Philippine rosewood. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Dalbergia havilandii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Dalbergia havilandii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
